title: Sort exercise picker popups alphabetically
description: Both exercise selection popup lists should display exercise names alphabetically.
close_reason: Exercise picker recents and search lists now sort alphabetically.

title: Remove recent split label from exercise picker
description: First exercise selection popup shows a Recent for {split} string that should be removed.
close_reason: Removed recent split label from exercise picker.

title: Restore workout detail row layout
description: Keep the old side-by-side workout detail modal look while preserving strict stacked set grouping and preventing overlap.
close_reason: Restored old side-by-side workout detail styling while preserving stacked set groups.

title: Improve view workout set grouping
description: Update workout detail modal to group adjacent identical sets while preserving order, and prevent exercise name/set data overlap.
close_reason: Implemented adjacent set grouping in workout detail modal and verified with lint.

title: Let modal scroll start from numeric inputs
description: Use TextInput responder settings and simpler weight input structure so ScrollView can take drag gestures that begin over numeric fields.
close_reason: Matched weight input to plain numeric input structure and allowed parent ScrollView to take drag responder on numeric TextInputs.

title: Make numeric inputs scroll-friendly
description: Change numeric workout fields so drag gestures over them can scroll the modal while taps still enter edit mode.
close_reason: Numeric fields now render as tap-to-edit controls so drag gestures over them can scroll the modal.

title: Improve workout modal scrolling over inputs
description: Allow ScrollView drag gestures in the log workout modal to work more predictably when starting near numeric TextInput fields.
close_reason: Added ScrollView keyboard/drag responder props so scrolling remains responsive around numeric inputs.

title: Polish workout modal exercise controls
description: Move exercise remove control to the exercise card footer beside the bodyweight toggle, and make Add Exercise button visually bolder than Add Set.
close_reason: Moved exercise remove icon to footer beside bodyweight toggle and made Add Exercise visually bolder.

title: Remove workout modal type label
description: Remove the visible Type of Exercise label from exercise cards in the log workout modal.
close_reason: Removed Type of Exercise visible label from log workout modal.

title: Remove workout modal exercise labels
description: Remove the visible Exercises section label and Exercise N per-card label from the log workout modal.
close_reason: Removed Exercises section label and Exercise N per-card label from log workout modal.

title: Firestore security rules for pending exercise creates
description: createPendingExercise (utils/create-pending-exercise.ts) writes exercises/pending-{slug} docs from the client but no firestore.rules exists in the repo. Need a rule allowing authenticated create on exercises/{id} when request.resource.data.status == 'pending_review' && request.resource.data.createdBy == request.auth.uid, denying client update/delete and non-pending creates. Until deployed, createPendingExercise fails with permission-denied and the picker silently falls back to the under-review sentinel.

title: PMP-1 Part A: flesh out exercise catalog seed to ~150 movements
description: Expand migration/catalog-seed.json from 34 to a comprehensive set of common gym/machine/calisthenics/cardio movements with variations (esp. cable). Keep existing schema v2 + trackingModes convention (reps_weight/reps_bodyweight/duration). Drop test-exercise fixture. Seed to Firestore is a user-gated step (needs write creds).
notes: Seed JSON complete + validated. migration/catalog-seed.json: 74 exercises, 203 variations, 277 selectable options. All 33 prior ids kept, test-exercise dropped, schema v2 + trackingModes convention preserved, new muscle 'traps' added. Dry-run passes (74+1 docs). REMAINING (user-gated): place pumppal-write-perms.json and run seed with --apply --catalog-version <bumped> to push to Firestore.
close_reason: Seeded 74 exercises / 203 variations to Firestore (pumppal-c9199), meta version 2. Orphaned test-exercise doc deleted. Collection verified at 74 docs.

title: Reconcile trackingModes data convention vs TrackingMode TS type
description: Firestore exercise docs use trackingModes values reps_weight/reps_bodyweight/duration (migration/catalog-seed.json, utils/create-pending-exercise.ts) but types/workout.ts TrackingMode union is 'reps'|'duration'|'distance'|'calories'. Decided intentionally to keep the data convention as-is for PMP-1, but the mismatch needs a real decision (align type to data, or migrate data to type) tracked separately.

title: Wire onCreateNew pending-exercise path into AI workout suggestions
description: app/modal.tsx handleAISuggest (~line 328) still hardcodes the under-review/ur_ sentinel for unmatched AI-suggested exercise names instead of using createPendingExercise like the manual picker flow does. Follow-up to make AI-suggested new exercises go through the same triage path.

title: Curator/admin triage UI or script for pending_review exercises
description: PMP-1 Part B writes user-submitted exercises to exercises/pending-{slug} with status: pending_review instead of a workout-local sentinel. Need a way for a curator to review these: promote to a curated catalog entry (add to migration/catalog-seed.json, re-seed with bumped --catalog-version) or reject, then delete the pending-* doc. Currently no UI or script exists for this; pending docs just accumulate.
